title: My Dad Gave My Brother The Company After 12 Years. So I Walked Away And Watched It Crumble
description: I built my father's roofing empire from the ground up for over a decade while my brother did nothing. At his retirement dinner in front of 40 guests, he handed the company to my brother instead of me. That night I quit, joined our biggest client, and refused to save him when everything fell apart. #FamilyBetrayal #JusticeServed #RealStory
thumb_text: HE GAVE MY BROTHER THE COMPANY. I WALKED AWAY AND WATCHED IT DIE

thumb_lines.text: DAD GAVE IT TO MY BROTHER
IN FRONT OF FORTY PEOPLE AT RETIREMENT DINNER, HE CHOSE THE BROTHER WHO DID NOTHING
